subcodes.first_line: A Book have We sent down in truth unto them that have turned their faces toward the Countenance of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, in days wherein the mountains were scattered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق لمن توجه الی وجه الله المهیمن القیوم فی ایام فیها نسفت جبال
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
